basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Junior Research Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT) Junior Research Fellowship Notification 2026 has been released on 23 April 2026 on the official website SVNIT . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Junior Research Fellowship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (M.E./M.Tech.) in Mechanical Engineering or allied branches, GATE qualified (mandatory), B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical, Production, Aerospace, Metallurgy or allied
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing, Production, Industrial & Production, Metallurgy, Applied Mechanics, Aerospace engineering or Allied branches with B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical, Production, Aerospace, Metallurgy, or allied branches. GATE qualified (mandatory).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Junior Research Fellowship Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SVNIT Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) position is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Mechanical Engineering or allied branches, be GATE qualified, and hold a B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical, Production, Aerospace, or Metallurgy.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellowship position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) post at SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 285 dated 23/04/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
